name: Thermaltake CTE C700 TG ARGB Snow Mid Tower Computer Case - 90-Degree Rotated Motherboard Tray - 3x Pre-installed 140mm CT140 ARGB Fans - Rotatable PCI-E Slots - Riser Mounting Bracket - 2x USB 3.0 - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C (CA-1X7-00F6WN-01)
